title: Cant open google sheets XLSX
author: dorshay6
body:

comments.author: erixtekila
comments.body:
Me either.
I get an error

```
Désolé, impossible d'importer ce type de fichier.
Types de fichiers acceptés : csv, txt, tsv, tab, htm, html, xls, xlsx, xlsm, xlt, xltm, xltx, ods.
```
Meaning unable to open the file.

comments.author: erixtekila
comments.body:
Sorry I mispelled the extension.
Disregard my comment.
